About: Reiss is a British fashion brand founded in 1971 by David Reiss in London. The company specializes in premium menswear and womenswear, offering sophisticated, contemporary designs with a focus on quality craftsmanship. With over 200 stores globally including flagship locations in London, New York, and Paris, Reiss combines British heritage with modern styling. The brand is known for its tailored clothing, outerwear, and accessories, catering to professionals and fashion-conscious consumers seeking timeless elegance.

COS (Collection of Style) is a Swedish fashion brand launched by H&M Group in 2007. Based in London, COS offers modern, functional, and timeless designs for men, women, and children. The brand emphasizes minimalist aesthetics, quality materials, and sustainable practices. With over 270 stores in 46 countries, COS targets design-conscious consumers seeking wardrobe essentials that transcend seasonal trends. The brand focuses on precise cuts, luxurious fabrics, and versatile pieces suitable for contemporary lifestyles.

ARKET is a modern-day market and lifestyle brand from H&M Group, launched in 2017. Headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden, ARKET offers essential clothing, homeware, and café experiences across Europe. The brand combines Scandinavian design with functionality and sustainability, providing timeless wardrobe staples for men, women, children, and babies. With approximately 30 stores and a strong online presence, ARKET emphasizes quality, transparency, and responsible sourcing in its operations.

& Other Stories is a Swedish fashion and beauty brand launched by H&M Group in 2013. Based in Stockholm and Paris, the brand offers curated collections of ready-to-wear, shoes, bags, accessories, jewelry, beauty, and skincare products. With ateliers in Paris and Stockholm, & Other Stories creates versatile, trend-led designs that celebrate individual style. The brand operates over 50 stores worldwide and maintains a strong e-commerce presence, targeting fashion-forward consumers seeking quality and creative expression.

Weekday is a Swedish denim and fashion brand launched in 2000, owned by H&M Group. Based in Stockholm, Weekday offers trend-driven, accessible fashion with a strong focus on denim, streetwear, and contemporary designs. The brand operates over 40 stores across Europe and has a significant online presence. Weekday targets young, urban consumers interested in sustainable fashion and self-expression, offering collections that blend Scandinavian simplicity with global street culture influences.

Monki is a Swedish fashion brand founded in 2006 and owned by H&M Group. Based in Stockholm, Monki offers playful, colorful, and trend-focused fashion for women. The brand emphasizes sustainability, inclusivity, and creative expression through its collections of clothing, accessories, and beauty products. With stores across Europe and Asia and a strong digital presence, Monki targets young, socially conscious consumers seeking affordable fashion that makes a statement and supports positive change.

Sézane is a French fashion brand founded in 2013 by Morgane Sézalory in Paris. The brand pioneered the concept of digital-first fashion with permanent and limited-edition collections released monthly. Sézane offers feminine, Parisian-inspired clothing, shoes, and accessories focusing on quality, timeless design, and sustainability. The brand operates several apartments and boutiques in Paris, London, New York, and other cities, combining online and offline retail experiences. Sézane is committed to ethical production and charitable initiatives.

ba&sh is a French fashion brand founded in 2003 by childhood friends Barbara Boccara and Sharon Krief in Paris. The brand offers contemporary, feminine ready-to-wear collections characterized by Parisian chic and effortless elegance. ba&sh operates over 300 stores worldwide across Europe, North America, Asia, and the Middle East. The brand focuses on quality craftsmanship, versatile designs, and sustainable practices, targeting modern women seeking sophisticated yet accessible fashion with a distinctive French touch.

Claudie Pierlot is a French fashion brand founded in 1984 in Paris. The brand specializes in feminine, Parisian-style ready-to-wear collections featuring refined silhouettes, quality materials, and timeless elegance. Part of the SMCP group alongside Sandro and Maje, Claudie Pierlot operates over 230 stores globally. The brand targets sophisticated women seeking versatile wardrobe staples that embody French elegance and contemporary design, with a focus on sustainable and responsible fashion practices.

Sandro is a French contemporary fashion brand founded in 1984 by Evelyne Chetrite in Paris. The brand offers modern, Parisian-inspired collections for men and women, combining classic tailoring with contemporary trends. As part of the SMCP group, Sandro operates over 650 stores worldwide across Europe, North America, Asia, and the Middle East. The brand emphasizes quality craftsmanship, versatile designs, and accessible luxury, targeting fashion-conscious consumers seeking sophisticated yet wearable pieces with distinctive French style.

Maje is a French fashion brand founded in 1998 by Judith Milgrom in Paris. The brand offers contemporary women's ready-to-wear collections characterized by feminine silhouettes, Parisian elegance, and modern design. Part of the SMCP group, Maje operates over 600 stores worldwide across Europe, Asia, North America, and the Middle East. The brand targets style-conscious women seeking quality, versatility, and accessible luxury, with increasing focus on sustainable materials and responsible production practices.

The Kooples is a French fashion brand founded in 2008 by brothers Alexandre, Laurent, and Raphaël Elicha in Paris. The brand offers rock-inspired, androgynous collections for men and women, blending British elegance with Parisian attitude. With over 400 stores globally and strong e-commerce presence, The Kooples is known for quality leather goods, tailored pieces, and couple collections. The brand emphasizes craftsmanship, timeless style, and accessible luxury targeting urban, fashion-forward consumers.

Comptoir des Cotonniers is a French fashion brand founded in 1995, specializing in contemporary women's ready-to-wear clothing. The brand is known for its minimalist, timeless designs, quality fabrics, and Parisian aesthetic. Comptoir des Cotonniers offers versatile wardrobe staples including knitwear, dresses, and outerwear. With stores across France and international markets, the brand targets modern women seeking elegant, comfortable clothing with an emphasis on natural materials and sustainable practices.

Sessùn is a French fashion brand founded in 1996 by Emma François in Marseille. The brand offers bohemian, feminine collections inspired by travel, art, and Mediterranean culture. Sessùn is committed to ethical fashion, sustainable materials, and responsible production processes. With boutiques in France and international stockists, the brand creates timeless pieces including dresses, knitwear, and accessories. Sessùn targets conscious consumers seeking quality, unique designs, and brands with strong environmental and social values.

American Vintage is a French fashion brand founded in 2005 in Marseille by Michaël Azoulay. The brand specializes in comfortable, casual basics with a vintage American aesthetic and French refinement. American Vintage offers essentials including t-shirts, knitwear, dresses, and loungewear in soft, quality fabrics. With stores across Europe and global distribution, the brand emphasizes simplicity, comfort, and timeless design. American Vintage targets consumers seeking relaxed, versatile wardrobe staples with a focus on natural materials.

IRO Paris is a French fashion brand founded in 2004 by brothers Arik and Laurent Bitton in Paris. The brand offers contemporary ready-to-wear collections characterized by rock 'n' roll attitude, Parisian elegance, and quality craftsmanship. IRO specializes in leather goods, denim, knitwear, and statement pieces for men and women. With boutiques in Paris, London, New York, and Asia, plus global wholesale distribution, IRO targets fashion-forward consumers seeking edgy yet sophisticated designs.

Zadig & Voltaire is a French luxury fashion brand founded in 1997 by Thierry Gillier in Paris. The brand offers contemporary ready-to-wear collections featuring cashmere knitwear, leather goods, and rock-inspired designs. Known for its rebellious spirit and Parisian chic, Zadig & Voltaire operates over 300 stores worldwide across Europe, North America, and Asia. The brand emphasizes quality materials, craftsmanship, and creative freedom, targeting consumers seeking luxury with an edgy, unconventional aesthetic.

Selected Homme is a Danish menswear brand founded in 1997, part of the Bestseller fashion group. Based in Denmark, the brand offers contemporary, Scandinavian-inspired clothing combining minimalist design with quality craftsmanship. Selected Homme provides premium essentials including tailoring, outerwear, knitwear, and denim for modern men. With stores across Europe and global e-commerce, the brand focuses on versatile, timeless pieces suitable for both professional and casual settings.

Jack & Jones is a Danish menswear brand founded in 1990, owned by Bestseller. Headquartered in Denmark, the brand offers contemporary casual wear and denim targeting young men. With over 1,000 stores globally and presence in more than 38 countries, Jack & Jones provides affordable fashion including jeans, t-shirts, shirts, and outerwear. The brand emphasizes trend-led designs, quality denim, and accessible pricing, catering to fashion-conscious consumers seeking versatile everyday menswear.

Vero Moda is a Danish women's fashion brand founded in 1987, owned by Bestseller. Based in Denmark, the brand offers affordable, trend-driven clothing for women worldwide. With over 1,300 stores in more than 50 countries, Vero Moda provides versatile collections including dresses, jeans, tops, and outerwear. The brand targets fashion-conscious women seeking accessible, contemporary designs with Scandinavian influence, emphasizing quality and value with increasing focus on sustainable materials.

ONLY is a Danish fashion brand founded in 1995 by Bestseller. Based in Denmark, the brand offers trendy, affordable women's fashion with a focus on denim, casual wear, and contemporary designs. With presence in over 5,000 stores worldwide across 50+ countries, ONLY targets young women seeking accessible fashion that reflects current trends. The brand emphasizes versatility, quality denim, and casual-chic styling with growing commitment to sustainable practices.

Wood Wood is a Danish streetwear and lifestyle brand founded in 2002 in Copenhagen by Karl-Oskar Olsen and Brian SS Jensen. The brand combines Scandinavian minimalism with streetwear culture, creating contemporary clothing, accessories, and collaborations. Wood Wood operates flagship stores in Copenhagen and Aarhus, with global stockists and strong online presence. The brand is known for unique graphics, quality construction, and collaborations with brands like Nike and Champion, targeting fashion-forward consumers seeking distinctive urban style.

Nudie Jeans is a Swedish denim brand founded in 2001 in Gothenburg by Maria Erixon Levin. The brand specializes in sustainable, high-quality jeans using 100% organic cotton. Nudie Jeans is committed to transparency, offering free repairs for life and encouraging denim reuse and recycling. With stores in Sweden and global distribution, the brand targets environmentally conscious consumers seeking durable, ethically produced denim. Nudie Jeans combines Scandinavian design with social and environmental responsibility.

Filippa K is a Swedish fashion brand founded in 1993 by Filippa Knutsson in Stockholm. The brand offers minimalist, timeless clothing for men and women with focus on quality, functionality, and Scandinavian design. Filippa K emphasizes sustainable practices, responsible materials, and circular fashion initiatives. With stores in Scandinavia and international stockists, the brand targets conscious consumers seeking versatile, long-lasting wardrobe essentials that transcend seasonal trends.

Acne Studios is a Swedish luxury fashion brand founded in 1996 in Stockholm by Jonny Johansson. The brand offers avant-garde ready-to-wear, footwear, accessories, and denim for men and women. Known for its innovative designs, quality craftsmanship, and creative expression, Acne Studios operates flagship stores in major cities worldwide. The brand combines Scandinavian minimalism with bold, unconventional aesthetics, targeting fashion-forward consumers seeking distinctive luxury pieces with artistic sensibility.

Stutterheim is a Swedish rainwear brand founded in 2010 by Alexander Stutterheim in Stockholm. The brand specializes in handmade, waterproof raincoats inspired by traditional Swedish fisherman's coats. Stutterheim offers minimalist, functional outerwear in various colors and styles for men, women, and children. With stores in Stockholm, Copenhagen, and global stockists, the brand emphasizes quality craftsmanship, timeless design, and Swedish heritage, targeting consumers seeking durable, stylish rain protection.

Hope is a Swedish fashion brand founded in 2001 in Stockholm. The brand offers contemporary, minimalist clothing for men and women with focus on tailoring, quality fabrics, and Scandinavian aesthetics. Hope emphasizes sustainable production, ethical practices, and timeless design. With stores in Stockholm and international retailers, the brand targets design-conscious consumers seeking refined, versatile pieces that combine simplicity with sophistication and responsible fashion values.

Tiger of Sweden is a Swedish fashion brand founded in 1903, originally specializing in tailored menswear. Based in Stockholm, the brand offers contemporary clothing and accessories for men and women, renowned for exceptional tailoring and Scandinavian design. Tiger of Sweden operates stores across Europe and has global distribution. The brand combines traditional craftsmanship with modern aesthetics, targeting professionals and fashion-conscious consumers seeking quality, sophisticated designs with Nordic influence.

Asket is a Swedish menswear brand founded in 2015 in Stockholm, focusing on radical transparency and sustainable fashion. The brand offers essential wardrobe staples including t-shirts, shirts, jeans, and outerwear with complete supply chain transparency. Asket operates exclusively online, providing detailed information about costs, materials, and production. The brand targets conscious consumers seeking timeless, durable clothing produced ethically with minimal environmental impact and maximum quality.

Sandqvist is a Swedish bag and accessories brand founded in 2004 in Stockholm by Anton Sandqvist and Sebastian Westin. The brand offers functional, minimalist backpacks, bags, and accessories inspired by Swedish nature and urban life. Sandqvist emphasizes sustainable materials, ethical production, and timeless design. With flagship stores in Scandinavia and global distribution, the brand targets outdoor enthusiasts and urban consumers seeking durable, stylish bags with Scandinavian design heritage.

Holzweiler is a Norwegian fashion brand founded in 2012 in Oslo by siblings Susanne and Andreas Holzweiler. The brand offers contemporary ready-to-wear collections combining Scandinavian aesthetics with bold prints and sustainable practices. Holzweiler is known for its iconic scarves, knitwear, and outerwear. With stores in Oslo and international stockists, the brand emphasizes quality, creativity, and environmental responsibility, targeting fashion-forward consumers seeking distinctive Nordic designs with artistic expression.

Nué Notes is a Danish accessories and ready-to-wear brand founded in 2016 in Copenhagen. The brand offers minimalist, modern designs focusing on leather goods, jewelry, and clothing. Nué Notes emphasizes quality craftsmanship, timeless aesthetics, and sustainable production. With presence in high-end retailers and online platforms, the brand targets conscious consumers seeking refined, versatile accessories and apparel with Scandinavian design sensibility and responsible values.

Rains is a Danish contemporary rainwear brand founded in 2012 in Aarhus. The brand reinterprets traditional rubber rainwear with minimalist, functional designs suitable for modern urban life. Rains offers waterproof jackets, coats, bags, and accessories in sleek, Scandinavian styles. With stores across Europe, North America, and Asia, plus strong e-commerce presence, the brand targets design-conscious consumers seeking practical, stylish rain protection with Nordic aesthetics.

GANNI is a Danish contemporary fashion brand founded in 2000, relaunched in 2009 by husband-and-wife team Ditte and Nicolaj Reffstrup in Copenhagen. The brand offers playful, colorful ready-to-wear collections characterized by Scandinavian aesthetics and responsible practices. GANNI operates stores globally and has strong wholesale presence. Known for its community-driven approach and sustainability initiatives, the brand targets modern, conscious consumers seeking joyful, accessible luxury with positive impact.

Stine Goya is a Danish fashion brand founded in 2006 by designer Stine Goya in Copenhagen. The brand offers bold, colorful collections featuring signature prints, playful designs, and feminine silhouettes. Stine Goya emphasizes creativity, sustainability, and joyful fashion. With showrooms in Copenhagen and stockists worldwide, the brand targets fashion-forward consumers seeking distinctive, artistic pieces that celebrate individuality and Nordic design innovation.

Han Kjøbenhavn is a Danish contemporary fashion brand founded in 2008 in Copenhagen by Jannik Davidsen. The brand offers minimalist menswear and unisex designs, specializing in eyewear, outerwear, and urban streetwear. Han Kjøbenhavn combines Scandinavian aesthetics with streetwear culture and architectural influences. With flagship stores in Copenhagen and global distribution, the brand targets design-conscious consumers seeking clean, functional pieces with distinctive Nordic character.

Designers Remix is a Danish fashion brand founded in 2002 by Charlotte Eskildsen in Copenhagen. The brand offers contemporary womenswear combining Scandinavian minimalism with feminine details and sustainable practices. Designers Remix emphasizes responsible production, ethical sourcing, and circular fashion initiatives. With stores in Copenhagen and international stockists, the brand targets conscious consumers seeking sophisticated, versatile clothing with Nordic design values and environmental commitment.

ROTATE Birger Christensen is a Danish fashion brand founded in 2018 by Jeanette Madsen and Thora Valdimars in Copenhagen, under the heritage house Birger Christensen. The brand offers party-ready, Instagram-friendly collections featuring bold colors, sculptural silhouettes, and glamorous designs. With strong digital presence and international stockists, ROTATE targets fashion-forward, social media-savvy consumers seeking statement pieces combining Scandinavian aesthetics with global party culture.

REMAIN Birger Christensen is a Danish contemporary fashion brand launched in 2018 under the heritage house Birger Christensen in Copenhagen. The brand offers elevated essentials combining Scandinavian minimalism with modern femininity and leather expertise. REMAIN emphasizes quality materials, timeless design, and versatile pieces. With international wholesale presence and e-commerce, the brand targets sophisticated consumers seeking refined, wearable luxury with Nordic design sensibility.

Munthe is a Danish fashion brand founded in 2005 by designer Naja Munthe in Copenhagen. The brand offers contemporary womenswear featuring romantic silhouettes, quality fabrics, and feminine details. Munthe combines Scandinavian design with bohemian influences and sustainable practices. With stores in Denmark and international distribution, the brand targets modern women seeking distinctive, elegant pieces that balance timeless appeal with contemporary trends and responsible production.

By Malene Birger is a Danish fashion brand founded in 2003 by designer Malene Birger in Copenhagen. The brand offers contemporary womenswear characterized by Scandinavian elegance, effortless sophistication, and modern femininity. Collections include ready-to-wear, accessories, and footwear combining quality craftsmanship with versatile design. With international stockists and e-commerce presence, By Malene Birger targets cosmopolitan women seeking refined, wearable pieces with Nordic aesthetic and timeless appeal.

Axel Arigato is a Swedish footwear and lifestyle brand founded in 2014 in Stockholm by Albin Johansson and Max Svärdh. The brand offers contemporary sneakers, ready-to-wear, and accessories combining Scandinavian minimalism with streetwear culture. Axel Arigato operates cafés and stores in Stockholm, London, Paris, and Copenhagen, creating community-focused retail experiences. The brand targets design-conscious consumers seeking quality, distinctive products with Swedish heritage and global appeal.

A Day's March is a Swedish menswear brand founded in 2014 in Stockholm. The brand offers timeless, versatile basics and essentials focusing on quality materials, Scandinavian design, and sustainable practices. A Day's March emphasizes minimalist aesthetics, functional pieces, and responsible production. With stores in Stockholm and online presence, the brand targets conscious consumers seeking durable, well-made wardrobe staples with Nordic sensibility and environmental commitment.

Legendary Service is a Swedish premium knitwear brand founded in 2015, specializing in high-quality sweaters and knitted garments. The brand focuses on exceptional craftsmanship, luxurious materials, and timeless Scandinavian design. Legendary Service operates primarily online with select retail partners, targeting consumers seeking investment pieces with superior quality, comfort, and longevity. The brand emphasizes sustainable production and enduring style over fast fashion trends.

Rodebjer is a Swedish fashion brand founded in 1999 by designer Carin Rodebjer in Stockholm. The brand offers contemporary womenswear characterized by feminine silhouettes, quality craftsmanship, and Scandinavian aesthetics. Rodebjer emphasizes sustainable practices, ethical production, and timeless design. With showrooms in Stockholm and international stockists, the brand targets conscious consumers seeking sophisticated, versatile pieces that combine elegance with environmental responsibility and Nordic design values.

Totême is a Swedish fashion brand founded in 2014 by Elin Kling and Karl Lindman in Stockholm. The brand offers minimalist, contemporary womenswear featuring clean lines, neutral palettes, and timeless silhouettes. Totême emphasizes quality materials, precise tailoring, and Scandinavian aesthetics. With flagship stores in Stockholm, Paris, London, and New York, plus international distribution, the brand targets sophisticated consumers seeking refined, versatile wardrobe essentials with understated luxury.

Nanushka is a Hungarian contemporary fashion brand founded in 2006 by designer Sandra Sándor in Budapest. The brand offers sophisticated, sustainable ready-to-wear collections featuring innovative vegan leather, organic materials, and minimalist design. Nanushka combines Central European craftsmanship with modern femininity and environmental consciousness. With flagship stores in New York, London, and Paris, plus global wholesale presence, the brand targets conscious consumers seeking luxury with responsible values.

Magda Butrym is a Polish luxury fashion brand founded in 2014 by designer Magda Butrym in Krakow. The brand offers feminine, romantic ready-to-wear collections featuring intricate details, quality craftsmanship, and bold designs. Known for signature rose embellishments and sophisticated silhouettes, Magda Butrym has gained international recognition. With stockists in luxury retailers worldwide, the brand targets fashion-forward consumers seeking distinctive, glamorous pieces with European craftsmanship and artistic expression.

Jigsaw is a British fashion brand founded in 1970 in London. The brand offers contemporary clothing, accessories, and footwear for men and women, emphasizing quality, craftsmanship, and thoughtful design. Jigsaw combines British heritage with modern aesthetics and sustainable practices. With stores across the UK and international presence, the brand targets discerning consumers seeking versatile, well-made pieces that balance timeless appeal with contemporary style and responsible production values.

Whistles is a British contemporary fashion brand founded in 1976 in London. The brand offers modern womenswear characterized by clean lines, quality fabrics, and sophisticated design. Whistles emphasizes versatile, wearable collections combining British tailoring with contemporary trends. With stores across the UK and international stockists, the brand targets urban, fashion-conscious women seeking refined, accessible pieces with distinctive style and attention to detail.

Hobbs is a British women's fashion brand founded in 1981 in Hampstead, London. The brand offers contemporary clothing, footwear, and accessories emphasizing British elegance, quality craftsmanship, and timeless style. Hobbs provides tailored workwear, occasion dresses, and everyday essentials. With stores across the UK and international presence, the brand targets professional women seeking sophisticated, versatile pieces combining classic British design with modern femininity and excellent fit.

L.K.Bennett is a British luxury fashion brand founded in 1990 by Linda Kristin Bennett in London. The brand offers elegant footwear, clothing, and accessories for women, known for quality craftsmanship and timeless British style. L.K.Bennett combines classic design with modern sophistication, creating versatile pieces suitable for professional and social occasions. With international presence and e-commerce, the brand targets discerning women seeking refined, feminine designs with British heritage.

Boden is a British clothing brand founded in 1991 by Johnnie Boden in London. Originally a mail-order catalog company, Boden now offers colorful, contemporary clothing for men, women, and children through catalogs and e-commerce. The brand is known for quality fabrics, cheerful prints, and British charm. With strong presence in the UK and USA, Boden targets families seeking well-made, distinctive casual wear with personality and responsible production practices.

ME+EM is a British contemporary fashion brand founded in 2009 by Clare Hornby in London. The brand offers modern womenswear focusing on versatile, high-quality essentials that transition seamlessly between occasions. ME+EM emphasizes exceptional fit, luxurious fabrics, and thoughtful design. With flagship stores in London and international e-commerce, the brand targets sophisticated women seeking refined, wearable pieces that combine elegance with practicality and British design sensibility.

RIXO is a British fashion brand founded in 2015 by best friends Henrietta Rix and Orlagh McCloskey in London. The brand offers vintage-inspired, feminine dresses and separates featuring bold prints, vibrant colors, and romantic silhouettes. RIXO emphasizes sustainable practices and deadstock fabrics. With flagship stores in London and international stockists, the brand targets fashion-forward women seeking distinctive, joyful pieces that celebrate femininity with environmental consciousness and British design flair.

Nobody's Child is a British sustainable fashion brand founded in 2015 in London. The brand offers contemporary womenswear featuring vintage-inspired designs, playful prints, and feminine silhouettes with focus on environmental responsibility. Nobody's Child uses sustainable materials and ethical production practices. Operating primarily online with select retail partnerships, the brand targets conscious consumers seeking affordable, stylish clothing with positive environmental and social impact.

Kitri is a British contemporary fashion brand founded in 2017 by sisters Haeni and Gaea Kim in London. The brand offers modern, feminine clothing designed for the everyday lives of city women. Kitri emphasizes versatility, quality, and accessible luxury with clean designs and sophisticated details. With flagship stores in London and e-commerce presence, the brand targets urban professionals seeking refined, wearable pieces that balance femininity with contemporary British design.

OMNES is a British sustainable fashion brand founded in 2018, formerly known as Kowtow London. The brand offers contemporary womenswear made from certified organic and sustainable materials with transparent, ethical production. OMNES provides versatile, timeless pieces including dresses, knitwear, and essentials. Operating primarily online, the brand targets environmentally conscious consumers seeking quality, stylish clothing with minimal environmental impact and maximum transparency throughout the supply chain.

Finisterre is a British sustainable outdoor clothing brand founded in 2003 in Cornwall by Tom Kay. The brand specializes in functional, eco-friendly apparel for surfing, sailing, and coastal living. Finisterre emphasizes responsible materials, circular design, and environmental activism. With stores in the UK and strong e-commerce presence, the brand targets outdoor enthusiasts and ocean lovers seeking durable, performance-driven clothing with minimal environmental impact and coastal British heritage.

Rapanui is a British sustainable fashion brand founded in 2008 on the Isle of Wight. The brand offers organic, ethically produced basics and custom apparel with complete supply chain transparency. Rapanui operates a circular business model including take-back and recycling programs. Using renewable energy and minimal waste production, the brand targets environmentally conscious consumers seeking quality, durable clothing with verified sustainable credentials and British innovation in circular fashion.

Community Clothing is a British social enterprise fashion brand founded in 2016 by Patrick Grant in Blackburn. The brand partners with British factories to produce high-quality garments during off-peak production times, supporting UK manufacturing. Community Clothing offers affordable, well-made essentials including shirting, knitwear, and outerwear. The brand emphasizes fair wages, quality craftsmanship, and accessibility, targeting conscious consumers seeking British-made clothing with social impact and exceptional value.

AllSaints is a British fashion brand and retail company founded in 1994 in London. Known for its rock-inspired aesthetic, leather jackets, and contemporary designs for men and women. With over 230 stores worldwide, AllSaints offers modern, edgy fashion combining British heritage with global appeal.

Ted Baker is a British luxury fashion brand founded in 1988 by Ray Kelvin in Glasgow. Offering contemporary menswear, womenswear, and accessories known for quality, attention to detail, and quirky British humor. The brand operates globally with stores across UK, Europe, and North America.

French Connection is a British fashion brand founded in 1972 by Stephen Marks. The brand offers contemporary clothing and accessories for men and women, blending French style with British design sensibility. Known for bold branding and accessible fashion with international presence.

Karen Millen is a British luxury fashion brand founded in 1981, offering sophisticated womenswear including tailored coats, dresses, and investment pieces. Known for quality craftsmanship and timeless elegance targeting professional women.

Massimo Dutti is a Spanish fashion brand owned by Inditex Group, founded in 1985. Offering premium quality menswear and womenswear with sophisticated, elegant designs. Operating over 750 stores worldwide across Europe, Americas, and Asia.
COS (Collection of Style) is a fashion brand from the H&M Group offering modern, timeless designs for men, women, and children with minimalist aesthetics and sustainable practices.

Mango is a Spanish fashion brand founded in 1984 in Barcelona. Offering contemporary fashion for men, women, and children. With over 2,700 stores in 115+ countries, Mango is one of Europe largest fashion retailers, known for Mediterranean-inspired design and accessible pricing.

Scotch & Soda is a Dutch fashion brand founded in 1985 in Amsterdam. Offering eclectic, creative menswear, womenswear, and denim collections inspired by global cultures and vintage aesthetics. Known for unique prints, quality fabrics, and distinctive Amsterdamstyle.

Maison Kitsuné is a Franco-Japanese lifestyle brand founded in 2002 in Paris. Combining fashion, music, and café culture, offering contemporary ready-to-wear collections with minimalist Parisian aesthetics and Japanese attention to detail.

Isabel Marant is a French luxury fashion house founded in 1994 by designer Isabel Marant in Paris. Offering bohemian chic womenswear characterized by effortless Parisian style, quality materials, and feminine silhouettes with over 40 boutiques worldwide.

AMI Paris is a French fashion brand founded in 2011 by Alexandre Mattiussi. Offering contemporary menswear and womenswear with relaxed Parisian style, friendly aesthetic, and quality craftsmanship. Known for the Ami de Coeur heart logo.

A.P.C. (Atelier de Production et de Création) is a French ready-to-wear brand founded in 1987 by Jean Touitou. Known for minimalist design, quality denim, and understated Parisian style with stores worldwide.

Belstaff is a British luxury fashion brand founded in 1924, specializing in outerwear and leather jackets. Known for heritage craftsmanship, motorcycle-inspired designs, and waterproof waxed cotton jackets. A cultural icon in British fashion.

Barbour is a British luxury fashion brand founded in 1894 in South Shields, England. Specializing in outerwear, particularly waxed cotton jackets. The brand holds Royal Warrants and is iconic in British countryside fashion with global distribution.

Paul Smith is a British luxury fashion brand founded in 1970 by Sir Paul Smith in Nottingham. Known for classic designs with a twist, multicolored stripe signature, and quality tailoring for men and women.

Joseph is a British contemporary fashion brand founded in 1972 by Joseph Ettedgui. Offering luxury womenswear specializing in knitwear, tailoring, and timeless wardrobe essentials with minimalist Parisian-British aesthetic.

Equipment is a French-American fashion brand founded in 1976, known for luxury silk shirts and contemporary womenswear. The brand combines Parisian elegance with California ease, offering timeless wardrobe staples.

GANT is a Swedish fashion brand founded in 1949, offering preppy, casual lifestyle clothing for men and women. Known for quality sportswear, shirts, and knitwear inspired by American Ivy League and European craftsmanship.

Marc O Polo is a Swedish-German fashion brand founded in 1967 in Stockholm. Offering premium casual wear focused on natural materials, Scandinavian aesthetics, and sustainable practices for men and women.

Norse Projects is a Danish fashion brand founded in 2004 in Copenhagen. Offering minimalist contemporary menswear and womenswear combining Scandinavian design with functional quality. Known for clean aesthetics and premium fabrications.

NN07 (No Nationality) is a Danish menswear brand founded in 2007 in Copenhagen. Offering contemporary essentials combining Scandinavian minimalism with global influences. Known for quality fabrics, relaxed fits, and versatile wardrobe staples.

Our Legacy is a Swedish fashion brand founded in 2005 in Jönköping. Offering progressive menswear and womenswear with experimental designs, quality materials, and unique textures. Known for innovative approach to contemporary fashion.

Marimekko is a Finnish design house founded in 1951 in Helsinki. Known for bold prints, vibrant colors, and distinctive patterns across fashion, home décor, and accessories. An iconic Nordic brand celebrating creative expression.

Fjällräven is a Swedish outdoor brand founded in 1960 by Åke Nordin in Örnsköldsvik. Known for the iconic Kånken backpack, sustainable outdoor clothing, and equipment. Combining nature-inspired design with environmental responsibility.

ARMEDANGELS is a German sustainable fashion brand founded in 2007 in Cologne. Offering contemporary basics and essentials made from organic and recycled materials with fair production. A leader in European sustainable fashion.

Samsøe Samsøe is a Danish fashion brand founded in 1993 in Copenhagen. Offering contemporary Scandinavian fashion for men and women with focus on quality, simplicity, and versatile wardrobe essentials. Known for clean designs and sustainable practices.

Baum und Pferdgarten is a Danish fashion brand founded in 1999 by Rikke Baumgarten and Helle Hestehave in Copenhagen. Offering contemporary womenswear with playful prints, bold colors, and feminine silhouettes.
Lovechild 1979 is a Danish fashion brand offering modern womenswear with bohemian influences, quality materials, and Scandinavian design aesthetics.
Maria Black is a Danish jewelry brand founded in 2010 in Copenhagen. Offering modern, minimalist jewelry and accessories with Scandinavian design sensibility and quality craftsmanship.

Gestuz is a Danish fashion brand founded in 2002 in Copenhagen. Offering contemporary womenswear combining Scandinavian aesthetics with urban edge. Known for quality leather goods, modern silhouettes, and trend-forward designs.
Custommade is a Danish fashion brand founded in 2001 in Copenhagen. Offering feminine ready-to-wear collections with romantic details, quality materials, and Scandinavian elegance for modern women.
Hosbjerg is a Danish fashion brand founded in 2016 in Copenhagen. Offering colorful, playful collections with bold prints and unique designs targeting young fashion-forward consumers.
Mads Nørgaard is a Danish fashion brand founded in 1986 in Copenhagen. Known for iconic striped t-shirts, contemporary basics, and classic Scandinavian design for men, women, and children.
Won Hundred is a Danish fashion brand founded in 2004. Offering sustainable contemporary fashion for men and women with minimalist Scandinavian design and responsible production practices.
Tiger Mist is an Australian fashion brand with strong European presence, offering trend-driven womenswear including dresses, tops, and accessories for fashion-forward consumers.
Seafolly is an Australian swimwear brand with strong European distribution, offering contemporary swimwear, resort wear, and accessories.

Toast is a British lifestyle brand founded in 1997 in Wales. Offering thoughtful, contemporary clothing and homeware with focus on quality, craft, and simple living. Known for natural materials, muted palettes, and relaxed silhouettes.
Thought Clothing is a British sustainable fashion brand offering contemporary basics and essentials made from natural, organic, and recycled materials with ethical production practices.
